name: file-registry-portability-graph
purpose: Evaluated 60+ tools to find a self-updating file registry with user-defined tags and upstream/downstream portability graph; concluded no single tool satisfies all criteria and recommended Option D (minimum-viable JSONL + PostToolUse hook + scope-tags).
notes: Ported from SoNash 2026-04-18. R-frpg is the direct foundation for sync-mechanism Piece 2 schema design — the scope enum (universal/user/project/machine/ephemeral) and Option D recommendation are binding inputs. 14 agents deployed (8 D-agents + 1 synthesizer + 2 verifiers + 1 contrarian + 1 OTB + 1 cross-model Gemini). 116 claims, 106 sources. metadata.json predates canonical deep-research JSONL schema (schemaVersion: sonash-pre-canonical-v0). KuzuDB abandoned Oct 2025 — Windows-relevant risk.

name: jason-os
purpose: Brainstormed JASON-OS project identity, distribution model, and sync strategy; chose Direction B→F (template evolving to platform) with bidirectional sync as top risk.
notes: Single-file session — only BRAINSTORM.md, no findings subdirectory, no claims or sources JSONL. Earliest session (2026-04-01, revisited 2026-04-03). Establishes the core framing: B→F template-to-platform, sync as #1 risk, anti-goals. Open questions in this brainstorm directly seeded the sync-mechanism brainstorm.

name: jason-os-mvp
purpose: Researched minimum viable changes to make JASON-OS feel like SoNash by identifying the three home-feel criteria (session boundaries, compaction defense, ambient intelligence) and a layered porting plan; includes Phase 3.97 gap pursuit that corrected 5 critical errors.
notes: 26 agents deployed (12 D + 4 V + 1 contrarian + 1 OTB + 6 G-gap + 2 GV-gap). 67 claims, 63 sources. synthesisVersion 1.2 post-gap-pursuit. Two CRITICAL bugs refuted (C-015, C-037). Unresolved strategic question: extract-from-SoNash vs design-from-scratch (SQ-1). Gem: PHASE_3_95_PLAN.md present alongside RESEARCH_OUTPUT.md — this session crossed into planning territory. metadata.json includes consumerHints and debtCandidates arrays. schemaVersion: sonash-pre-canonical-v0 (same as R-frpg, predates canonical schema).

name: sync-mechanism
purpose: Active session: brainstormed and converged on 5-piece library-catalog architecture for bidirectional sync between JASON-OS and SoNash; currently executing Piece 1 discovery scan.
notes: Parent session for current agent work. Do not recurse into piece-1a-discovery-scan-jason-os/ — that is us. BRAINSTORM.md status: CONVERGED, routing to /deep-research Piece 1. 17 files from discovery agents D1-D7 already written to findings/. BRAINSTORM.md explicitly names R-frpg as dependency (scope enum + Option D recommendation). Session model is two-phase: JASON-OS first (current), SoNash second.
